posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone ,

I’m running a short, practical webinar this Friday at 9:30am on monday Vibe — focused on what it actually is, where it genuinely adds value, and some real use cases (not hype).

We’ll cover:

  • What monday Vibe does (and what it doesn’t)

  • When it makes sense to use Vibe vs boards or automations

  • Examples of problems Vibe is well-suited to solving

  • How to think about prompts and intent before you build

This is aimed at people designing or improving workflows in monday.com — especially if you’re curious about Vibe but not quite sure where it fits yet.

If that sounds useful, you’re very welcome to join.

Register here: From Idea to Impact: Using monday Vibe to Build What Your Team Actually Needs | Meeting-Join | Microsoft Teams

Happy to answer questions in the comments too.

posts.author: jcorrea (Jose Correa)
posts.cookedHtml: I missed this session. Is it recorded? Is it possible to see it?
